title: Soulection White Label: 018
content:
Coming to us from Birmingham, England – just north of London,19 year old ROM who has been producing and playing guitar since he was 9, delivers 3 distinct tracks for the 18th installation of our White Label Series.

Inspired by late 90s and early 2000s RnB and jazz, ROMderful’s diverse production style he calls “ROMderful” also pulls from orchestral music, nature, and for this project he tells us “mainly happiness and good vibes”.

Laced with heavy bass, an uptempo sensibility and wavy chord progressions, ROMderful brings in singer Emmavie and producer DEFFIE to add their complimentary sounds to this already bubbling White Label installation.
